name: Cheese-Bacon Flowerpots
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces hard sharp cheese (cheddar or Swiss)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon until it is brown but not crisp.
2. Roll each strip tightly with two forks.
3. Continue frying the bacon rolls until they are crisp, then drain thoroughly on paper towels.
4. Cut each bacon roll in half to create 2 smaller rolls.
5. Cut the cheese into 1-inch cubes.
6. Slice each green olive in half lengthwise (for the leaves).
7. Assemble the flowerpot:
- Insert a toothpick halfway into a cheese cube.
- Skewer the two olive halves onto the toothpick, pointing each half in opposite directions to simulate leaves.
- Place the bacon-roll "flower" on top and serve.
Do-Ahead Note: Cube the cheese and fry the bacon into flowers up to 24 hours before. Refrigerate the bacon separately in foil for easy reheating at party time.
